message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for ReduceOr

Adds 20 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Boolean OR reduction: all false, all true, mixed, single true
- Boolean 2D: axis 0, axis 1, full reduction
- Integer bitwise OR: basic, with zeros, all same, complementary
- Integer 2D: axis 0, axis 1, full reduction
- 3D tensor reduction
- Mathematical properties: idempotent, absorbing element, identity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
